title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Momonosuke, Unknown person #10, Beast Pirates, Unknown person #11, Kaido as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Same old cat. At least he made it in time! KAPPAPPA!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Neko-chan must have gotten as big as inu-chan!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've gotta hurry'n get to the rear entrance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Due to the ocean currents...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A normal ship can only approach from the front. But this isn't a normal ship, so we don't have to worry about that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: With any luck...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kinemon and denjiro have made it to the rear entrance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Be safe, everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We have to carry out often-sama's will!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Please be all right, momonosuke- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Seems like everyone's doing well!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're right in the middle of the raid!

dialogue.speaker: Beast Pirates
dialogue.text: So, they're calling it "onigashima" now?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: inter- eating.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But man, I can't believe it. You and I showed up at the same time?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess there was no point in giving you that message for straw hat- you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GORO NYANYA! No kidding! I guess I can just chuck it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't forget! Jack destroyed Zou, and he was only ONE of their officers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's do or die!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You made the right choice, Marco.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, I liked open, but word about Wano never made it to sea.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never could've imagined you had a situation like this brewing- yoi.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All right! Let's get a move on! I've got a great idea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Current location

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: kyoshiro! I'd heard you weren't coming this year!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Well, keep that between us, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAHAHA! flying under the radar, huh? Hey, what happened to your pompadour? You loved that thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And what about you? You left the party? That's not like you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ahh, yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: It's kaido-san's brat.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess he disappeared. He's gotta be on the island, though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I've got my men searching for him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here too, was an addition not listed on the map... a gate blocking the road.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "But for the Yakuza boss "kyoshiro," it was a trivial obstacle.

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: Huh!? Hey! What're you doing, kyoshiro!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What's the big idea!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GAG HIM.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Do you know the history of wano,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: SASAKI?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With one of the troublesome flying six out of the way...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The southern army split into two forces, just as the eastern army did.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Head for the dome!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: The Noose steadily tightens around Kaido's neck!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Assault force

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
